mapper.select: SELECT t1.purchase_id, t1.asset_name, t1.category_id, t1.spec, t1.model, t1.size, t1.material, t1.use_range, t1.warehouse_id, t1.purchase_price, t1.sale_price, t1.supplier_id, t2.supplier_name, t1.size_unit_id, t1.measure_unit_id, t3.unit_name as measure_unit_name, t1.purchase_num, t1.can_in_num, t1.purchase_reason, t1.submit_status, t1.audit_status, t1.in_status, t1.create_by, t1.create_time, t1.update_by, t1.update_time, t1.del_flag, t1.remark FROM asset_purchase AS t1 LEFT JOIN asset_supplier AS t2 ON t1.supplier_id = t2.supplier_id LEFT JOIN asset_unit AS t3 ON t1.measure_unit_id = t3.unit_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t1.purchase_id, t1.asset_name, t1.submit_status, t1.audit_status, t1.in_status, t1.purchase_price, t1.sale_price, t1.purchase_num, t1.can_in_num, t1.spec, t1.model, t3.unit_name FROM asset_purchase AS t1 LEFT JOIN asset_unit AS t3 ON t1.measure_unit_id = t3.unit_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
